  • Constructor Details

    • Policy

      public Policy()

    • Policy

      public Policy(int usrPolicyNum, String usrProvider, String usrFName, String usrLName, int usrAge, String usrSmoker, double usrHeight, double usrWeight)

      This is the policy constructor that accepts user input as arguments

      Parameters:
      usrPolicyNum - the policy number given by the user
      usrProvider - the insurance policy provider name given by the user
      usrFName - the first name of the policy holder given by the user
      usrLName - the last name of the policy holder given by the user
      usrAge - the age of the policy holder given by the user
      usrSmoker - is the policy holder a smoker or not
      usrHeight - the height of the policy holder given by the user
      usrWeight - the weight of the policy holder given by the user
